seo.heroImageAlt: Vibe Services — conseil en affaires au Royaume-Uni et bureau à Londres
seo.bottomTitle: Création d'entreprise au UK & substance — Vibe Services
seo.bottomText:
Vibe Services aide les entreprises internationales à établir une vraie présence au Royaume-Uni. Entrée sur le marché clé en main : immatriculation (LTD/LLP), adresse enregistrée, directeur local, comptabilité, TVA, paie et organisation commerciale.

Ne perdez pas 12 mois — nous le faisons en 3. Parmi nos clients : Alteg, Alpengold, Green Up, Beehave, Mirax et Braz. Réservez une consultation gratuite de 15 minutes.
seo.faqHeading: Questions fréquentes sur la création d'entreprise au UK

faq.question: What is substance in the UK and why does it matter?
faq.answer: Substance means a real operational presence: office, staff or management, and genuine business activity in the UK. Without it, HMRC may challenge your tax position and UK banks may freeze or reject accounts. Vibe Services builds compliant substance from day one — so you avoid regulatory risk and protect your business reputation.

faq.question: How fast can you set up a UK business?
faq.answer: Our fixed 12-week roadmap takes you from idea to operational presence and first sales — typically 3 months end-to-end. Week 1–2: structure and banking prep. Week 3–6: registration and substance. Week 7–10: VAT and accounting. Week 11–12: sales launch. Parallel workstreams mean you don't wait 12 months like a DIY approach.

faq.question: What documents are needed to open a UK company?
faq.answer: Typically: passport copies of directors and shareholders, proof of address, business plan summary, ownership structure chart, and source-of-funds documentation for banking. We prepare a bank-ready pack: shareholder agreements, substance evidence plan, and Companies House filings — so you avoid rejection loops.

faq.question: How much does UK business setup cost?
faq.answer: Cost depends on structure (LTD vs LLP), substance level, and whether you need accounting and sales support. Packages typically start from £3,500 for registration + substance basics. Book a free consultation — we'll give you a transparent quote with no hidden fees within 48 hours.

faq.question: Can non-residents open a UK company and bank account?
faq.answer: Yes, with the right structure and substance. We guide international owners through registration, HMRC compliance and banking — reducing rejection risk from UK banks. Over 50 cross-border setups completed for EU and Asian companies.

faq.question: Which company structure should I choose — LTD or LLP?
faq.answer: It depends on ownership, tax position and business model. LTD suits most trading companies; LLP works for professional partnerships. Our legal director Dmitry Lakshin analyses your situation and recommends the most tax-efficient, compliant structure.

faq.question: What if HMRC challenges my substance?
faq.answer: We design every setup with HMRC's substance criteria in mind: real office, local management, documented decisions, and genuine activity. If challenged, we provide evidence packs and support your response. 100% of our clients have passed banking and initial compliance checks.

faq.question: How do I contact Vibe Services?
faq.answer: Book a consultation via the form on this site, email info@vibe-service.co.uk, or message us on Telegram or WhatsApp. Response within one business day.

services.heading: Ce que nous faisons pour votre activité au UK

howWeWork.heading: How we work

step1.title: Discovery & structure
step1.desc: We analyse your business model, tax position and ownership — then design a UK structure that satisfies HMRC and banks.
bullets: Business model review and ownership map
LTD vs LLP recommendation with tax rationale
Shareholder agreement draft and substance checklist

step2.title: Registration & substance
step2.desc: Company formation, registered office, local director and operational presence — everything UK regulators expect.
bullets: Companies House filing (IN01, PSC register, articles)
Registered office + real office or co-working substance
Local director appointment and board resolutions
Bank application pack: business plan, KYC, source of funds

step3.title: Accounting & compliance
step3.desc: VAT, bookkeeping, payroll and annual filings — stay compliant and avoid penalties while you focus on growth.
bullets: VAT registration and Making Tax Digital setup
Xero or Sage bookkeeping with monthly management accounts
Payroll (PAYE/RTI) if you hire UK staff
Corporation tax and annual accounts preparation

step4.title: Sales & go-to-market
step4.desc: Market analysis, marketing setup and UK sales team — from launch to first revenue and beyond.
bullets: UK market sizing and competitor analysis
Brand localisation, website and CRM setup
B2B or B2C channel strategy and first campaigns
Sales hire support: job spec, interviews, onboarding

howWeWork.subheading: A transparent, step-by-step process with clear deliverables at every stage — so you always know what's happening and why.

team.heading: Meet the team
team.description: Three specialists who combine international structuring expertise, UK law and on-the-ground operations — so your setup works in practice, not just on paper.

alex.name: Alex Valor
alex.bio: 15 years in international structuring and UK market entry. Alex has led 50+ cross-border setups for companies from the EU, Asia and the Middle East — from entity design to first UK revenue. Author of guides on substance and tax planning. He knows exactly what HMRC and UK banks look for — and builds setups that pass scrutiny.

dmitry.name: Dmitry Lakshin
dmitry.bio: UK corporate law specialist with deep expertise in LTD/LLP structures, shareholder agreements and regulatory compliance. Dmitry handles Companies House filings, PSC registers and tax-efficient structuring for international owners. Every project is legally sound, documented and defensible.

geoff.name: Geoff Madd
geoff.bio: Manages day-to-day UK operations for international clients: office management, local staff, banking relationships and HMRC correspondence. Geoff ensures your substance is real — not a mailbox — and that local representation works when banks or regulators ask questions.

cases.heading: Case studies
cases.subheading: Real stories from international brands we've helped enter the UK market — with dates, deliverables and measurable results.

alteg.title: Alteg
alteg.summary: UK representative office and B2B sales channels — live in 11 weeks.
alteg.situation: EU-based consumer brand selling in the UK through distributors. Post-Brexit, needed direct UK presence for contracts and banking.
alteg.task: Set up a compliant UK entity, open a business account and launch B2B sales without disrupting existing operations.
alteg.solution: LTD registration, London registered office, local director, substance package, bank-ready documentation and CRM setup. Supported first two UK sales hires.
alteg.result: Operational in 11 weeks (March 2025). First UK B2B contract £42,000 signed within 60 days of launch. Bank account approved on first application.

alpengold.title: Alpengold
alpengold.summary: Operational presence and full accounting — VAT registered in week 8.
alpengold.situation: Premium food & beverage brand from Montenegro planning UK retail expansion. No local entity or tax registration.
alpengold.task: Build compliant substance, register for VAT and set up accounting before first UK shipments.
alpengold.solution: Substance package with real office access, Companies House setup, VAT registration, Xero bookkeeping and supply chain compliance review.
alpengold.result: HMRC VAT number received in week 8 (June 2024). Compliant accounts from day one. First UK retail listing secured Q3 2024.

greenup.title: Green Up
greenup.summary: Company registration and substance — bank approved without resubmission.
greenup.situation: Sustainability startup with international investors. Previous DIY UK setup rejected by two banks.
greenup.task: Restructure the UK entity with proper substance and secure banking.
greenup.solution: New LTD structure, shareholder agreement, local director, substance evidence pack and direct bank introduction through our UK banking partners.
greenup.result: Bank account opened in 6 weeks (September 2024). No resubmissions. Investors received compliant UK structure for due diligence.

beehave.title: Beehave
beehave.summary: End-to-end UK launch — from entity to first employee in 12 weeks.
beehave.situation: Tech-enabled services company entering UK market for the first time. Needed full stack: legal, accounting and operations.
beehave.task: Launch UK operations from zero — entity, substance, accounting, first hire.
beehave.solution: Turnkey package: LTD setup, substance, VAT registration, payroll setup and office management. Recruited first UK operations manager.
beehave.result: Full operations live in 12 weeks (January 2025). First UK employee onboarded with PAYE. Monthly management accounts delivered from month one.

mirax.title: Mirax
mirax.summary: Legal and tax compliance for ongoing UK operations.
mirax.situation: Established UK entity with gaps in compliance documentation. Risk of HMRC enquiry and banking review.
mirax.task: Audit existing structure, fix compliance gaps and establish ongoing support.
mirax.solution: Compliance audit, PSC register correction, substance upgrade, VAT reconciliation and quarterly compliance reviews with Geoff's UK team.
mirax.result: All filings current within 4 weeks (November 2024). HMRC enquiry risk reduced. Banking relationship maintained without interruption.

braz.title: Braz
braz.summary: UK sales organisation and marketing launch — first revenue in 10 weeks.
braz.situation: Ukrainian brand with strong EU sales, zero UK presence. Wanted direct UK sales without building an in-house team immediately.
braz.task: Launch UK sales and marketing with minimal upfront investment.
braz.solution: Market analysis, brand localisation, UK website, LinkedIn campaigns and outsourced sales rep model. CRM and reporting dashboard.
braz.result: First UK orders within 10 weeks of kick-off (April 2025). £28,000 revenue in first quarter. Pipeline of 15 qualified B2B leads.

privacy.title: Politique de confidentialité
privacy.intro: La présente Politique de confidentialité décrit comment Vibe Services collecte, utilise et protège les données personnelles lorsque vous visitez vibe-service.co.uk et nous transmettez une demande.

general.title: 1. Dispositions générales
paragraphs: Vibe Services fournit des services de conseil en affaires au Royaume-Uni, notamment l'immatriculation de sociétés, la substance, la comptabilité et l'accompagnement commercial.
En utilisant notre site, vous confirmez avoir lu la présente Politique. Si vous n'êtes pas d'accord, veuillez ne pas transmettre de données personnelles.

dataCollected.title: 2. Données collectées
paragraphs: Nous collectons les données que vous nous communiquez volontairement :
list: numéro de téléphone ou adresse e-mail ;
données techniques : adresse IP, type de navigateur, langue (journaux serveur).

purposes.title: 3. Finalités du traitement
list: traiter vos demandes et planifier des consultations ;
fournir nos services de conseil en affaires au Royaume-Uni ;
améliorer notre site et nos services ;

legalBasis.title: 4. Base juridique
paragraphs: Le traitement repose sur votre consentement lors de l'envoi du formulaire de contact.
Nous pouvons également nous appuyer sur l'intérêt légitime pour la sécurité du site.

sharing.title: 5. Tiers
paragraphs: Nous ne vendons pas vos données. Le partage est limité à :
list: outils de communication (Telegram, WhatsApp) si vous avez fourni ces coordonnées ;
autorités compétentes lorsque la loi l'exige.

retention.title: 6. Conservation
paragraphs: Les données du formulaire de contact sont conservées aussi longtemps que nécessaire pour traiter votre demande, jusqu'à 3 ans après le dernier contact.
Les journaux serveur sont conservés jusqu'à 12 mois.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
paragraphs: Nous utilisons des cookies strictement nécessaires (par ex. préférence de langue).
Des outils d'analyse pourront être ajoutés ultérieurement — la présente Politique sera mise à jour en conséquence.

rights.title: 8. Vos droits
paragraphs: Selon la législation applicable, vous pouvez :
list: demander leur rectification ou leur suppression ;
introduire une réclamation auprès d'une autorité de contrôle.

security.title: 9. Sécurité
paragraphs: Nous mettons en œuvre des mesures organisationnelles et techniques pour protéger vos données.
Les données sont transmises via HTTPS.

transfers.title: 10. Transferts internationaux
paragraphs: Nous travaillons avec des clients dans le monde entier. Les données peuvent être traitées en dehors de votre pays de résidence, avec des garanties appropriées.

children.title: 11. Mineurs
paragraphs: Nos services s'adressent aux entreprises. Nous ne collectons pas sciemment de données concernant des personnes de moins de 18 ans.

changes.title: 12. Modifications
paragraphs: Nous pouvons mettre à jour la présente Politique. La version en vigueur est toujours disponible sur cette page avec la date de mise à jour.

contact.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: Pour toute question relative à la confidentialité, contactez :

servicePages.ctaDescription: Réservez une consultation gratuite et obtenez un plan sur mesure pour votre entrée sur le marché britannique

review1.author: Dmitry K.
review1.text: Vibe Services set up our UK presence in under 3 months. Professional, transparent and always available. Bank account approved on the first try — something our previous advisors couldn't achieve.

review2.author: Maria S.
review2.text: Finally a team that understands substance requirements. After two bank rejections with a DIY setup, Vibe restructured everything and we were operational within 6 weeks.

review3.author: James R.
review3.text: Clear process from start to finish. They handled registration, accounting and our first UK sales hire. First revenue in 10 weeks — exactly as promised.

review4.author: Elena V.
review4.text: VAT registered in 8 weeks, accounting set up from day one. Geoff's team manages our UK office so we can focus on product. Highly recommend for F&B brands entering UK retail.

review5.author: Thomas H.
review5.text: Turnkey launch in 12 weeks — entity, substance, payroll, first employee. Dmitry's legal work was thorough; every document was bank-ready. Worth every penny.

review6.author: Andrei P.
review6.text: They fixed our compliance gaps in 4 weeks and saved our banking relationship. Alex explained every step in plain language. Now we have quarterly reviews and peace of mind.

review7.author: Sarah L.
review7.text: Used Vibe for a second UK entity after a great experience with our first setup. Consistent quality, fast response times and genuine expertise in cross-border structuring.
